title: Congenic genotypes
author: Doris, Peter
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: “Congenic genotypes” This table shows sequenom generated SNP genotypes across the genomes of SHR-A3 and the SHR-A3( IgH -B2) congenic lines. There are two columns of genotypes for two individual SHR-A3( IgH -B2) congenics. These are both progeny of the same founders. All their genotypes outside of the  IgH locus are identical to SHR-A3. The list includes two genotypes targeting the proximal and distal ends of the  IgH locus. These were typed by PCR and gel analysis. Both are SHR-B2 alleles.
